title: Dr. Robert Hadden Sexual Abuse Lawsuits

seo_title: Dr. Robert Hadden Lawsuits | Help Law Group
seo_description: Survivors of Dr. Robert Hadden's abuse may have legal options. Learn about lawsuits, settlements, and how Help Law Group can support your case.
seo_focus_keyword: Dr. Robert Hadden sexual abuse lawsuit
seo_secondary_keywords: Robert Hadden Columbia University abuse, NewYork-Presbyterian gynecologist sexual abuse

lead_form.name: Dr. Robert Hadden Sexual Abuse Lawsuits

sections.content:
For more than two decades, Dr. Robert Hadden practiced as an OB-GYN at two of New York City's most prominent medical institutions. During that time, he sexually abused hundreds of patients.

Help Law Group advocates for survivors who were sexually abused by Dr. Robert Hadden.

sections.headline: What You Need to Know
sections.content:
• Public reporting describes sexual abuse spanning roughly 1987 to 2012.

  • Over 1,000 survivors have come forward through civil litigation.

  • Columbia University has reportedly paid more than $1 billion in settlements.

  • Hadden was sentenced to 20 years in federal prison in July 2023.

sections.headline: Who Is Dr. Robert Hadden?
sections.content: Dr. Robert Hadden worked as an obstetrician-gynecologist at Columbia University Irving Medical Center and NewYork-Presbyterian Hospital.

sections.headline: Timeline of Events
sections.content:
1987

Hadden begins his OB-GYN practice at Columbia University.

June 2012

A patient calls 911 to report assault.

July 2023

Sentenced to 20 years in federal prison.

sections.headline: You Have Been Carrying This Long Enough
sections.content: Hundreds of survivors have already come forward. Help Law Group is here when you are ready.
sections.cta_text: Speak With a Case Advocate Today

sections.headline: Did the Hospitals Know?
sections.content: Investigative reporting and court records have raised serious questions about what Columbia and NewYork-Presbyterian knew.

sections.headline: Do You Have a Case?
sections.content: Many survivors reach out years after their appointments. The conversation starts with what you remember.

faqs.question: How long do I have to file a lawsuit?
faqs.answer: New York's Adult Survivors Act lookback window ran from November 2022 to November 2023 and is now closed. However, other options may still exist.

faqs.question: Can I come forward anonymously?
faqs.answer: Many survivors have filed civil claims as Jane Doe plaintiffs. Courts have regularly permitted anonymous filings in sexual abuse cases.

final_cta.headline: Take the First Step at Your Own Pace
final_cta.content: Submit the form below or click to request a private case review.
final_cta.cta_text: Get Answers. Start Your Confidential Review.
